cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, is this Vidya Srinivas? This is Agent Kumar from Passport Seva Kendra's support line. I'm calling regarding your query on our website, reference number PSK12345.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, yes. I had submitted a query about my passport application status, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, I see. Your application is currently under review. Can you please confirm your date of birth and the application reference number for security purposes, ji?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 33s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: An agent from the Passport Seva Kendra's support line calls a user back in response to a query the user had lodged on the official website. The agent provides the resolution or required information.
